summary: Reworded one SKILL.md prose line that began with the binary name ('apify-pp-cli is the operator CLI...'), which verify-skill parsed as a bash recipe invoking a non-existent `is` command. Changed to 'This CLI is the operator-side interface...'.
rationale: verify-skill scans lines starting with the binary name as command recipes; a descriptive sentence starting with the binary name is a false positive that fails the leg.
